t_ch: 哎呀呀，真是没想到…不过容我多一句嘴，两位其实应该把宝石单独取下来拍卖的。
t_en: Well, well, well, who'd have thought it... Allow me to make a suggestion — you should only auction off the gems.

t_ch: 你说什么呢？那是「菌菌」的眼睛，不准取下来！
t_en: What are you talking about? You can't just take Junjun's eyes off!

t_ch: …别生气，小朋友，别生气！我知道了，那就遵从主人的意愿，维持原样来拍卖。
t_en: ...Alright, alright, don't get upset, little missy! I'll respect the wish of the owner and keep Junjun here intact.

t_ch: 来，请在这份商品委托合同上签上名字——
t_en: Please sign this commodity contract here...

t_ch: 虎克来签！
t_en: Let me do it!

t_ch: 如果两位也打算参与竞价的话，请在这份买家身份注册表上也登记一下。
t_en: And if you and your friend would like to bid, please fill out this buyer registration form as well.

t_ch: 当然要参与，我再签一次！{NICKNAME}，你快打听一下探针的事！
t_en: Of course we'd like to bid! I'll sign again! {NICKNAME}, ask about the probe!

t_ch: 探针？小朋友指的可是「地髓矿脉探针」？据在下所知，想买探针的人还真不少，成交价格估计不会低于<unbreak>600</unbreak>冬城盾。
t_en: Probe? Are you talking about the Geomarrow Probe? As far as I know, there are a lot of people interested in acquiring that device. The estimated sale price is no less than <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield.

t_ch: 好贵！
t_en: That's a lot of money!

t_ch: 小钱！
t_en: That's chump change!

t_ch: 别在这里吹牛了！
t_en: Stop bluffing!

t_ch: 我们会把「地髓矿脉探针」安排在最后的阶段拍卖——谁叫那是既稀有又实用的超级宝贝呢！
t_en: Because it's a rare and useful treasure, the Geomarrow Probe will be up for bidding in the final round of the auction.

t_ch: 不过别慌，你们这玩偶熊身上的宝石也价值不俗。要是有人愿意出大价钱买下，你们的探针也就有着落了。
t_en: But don't worry, the gems on your teddy bear are also very valuable. You'll have the chance to bid on the probe if someone's willing to pay a high price for him.

t_ch: 我最擅长哄抬物价了！
t_en: I'm great at bidding a price up!

t_ch: 嘿，那就看你本事了。
t_en: Oh? Then we'll be counting on you.

t_ch: 感觉这东西也卖不了多少钱。
t_en: He doesn't seem like he'll fetch too high a price.

t_ch: 别这么悲观！
t_en: Don't be so pessimistic!

t_ch: 告诉你们一个诀窍——<color=#dbc291ff>参加竞拍的买家越多，玩偶大熊的价格就能卖得越高。</color>这会场里还潜伏了很多潜在买家，只需要你们轻轻地推他们一把。
t_en: I'll tell you a secret... <color=#dbc291ff>the more bidders there are, the more you can get for your bear here.</color> This place is teeming with potential buyers. It only takes a gentle nudge to get them to join in.

t_ch: 虎克不是很理解，具体该怎么做呢？
t_en: Hook doesn't get it. What are we supposed to do?

t_ch: 用真诚的爱感化。
t_en: Persuade them with true love.

t_ch: 「真诚的爱」原来是这么好用的东西吗？好耶！
t_en: Is "true love" really that useful? Hee-hee!

t_ch: 用花言巧语欺骗。
t_en: Deceive them with charismatic rhetoric.

t_ch: 原来如此，那虎克恐怕帮不上忙啦，因为虎克不会骗人！
t_en: Hmm, I won't be much help then. Hook never deceives anyone!

t_ch: 用强硬的手段威胁。
t_en: Threaten them with hardball tactics.

t_ch: 好耶，洞洞机已经准备好了！
t_en: Yay! Diggertron's all set and ready to go!

t_ch: 「菌菌」那么可爱，我们赶紧去问问看，肯定会有很多人想买的。
t_en: Let's ask around. Junjun's super cute — I'm sure there'll be loads of people interested in buying him.

t_ch: 别来和我搭话！这拍卖会上的人我一个都不信！
t_en: Don't try making conversation with me! I don't trust anyone here!

t_ch: 告诉你，拍卖会的赢家只有一个——凡是在场的，统统都是我的对手！
t_en: I'm warning you, there's only one winner at an auction — everyone here is one of my competitors!

t_ch: 你是不是脑子有点…
t_en: Did you... hit your head?

t_ch: 这个大叔，好奇怪啊……
t_en: What a weird man...

t_ch: 哼，你其实是在夸我对不对？臭小鬼，别以为我听不出来！
t_en: Hmph, I'll take that as a compliment! You think I can't hear you, you little brat?

t_ch: 大家明明都挺友善的。
t_en: Well, at least it's a friendly crowd.

t_ch: 哼，你以为能骗得了我？表面装得越友善，背后心机就越重！
t_en: Haha, you think you can fool me? The friendlier they are on the outside, the more devious they are on the inside!

t_ch: 这个大叔，好像很容易生气的样子……
t_en: Seems like this guy's got a real bad temper...

t_ch: 生气？生什么气，我心情好得很，别胡说！
t_en: Temper? What temper? I'm perfectly calm, thank you!

t_ch: 你们是卖家吧？刚才我在竞拍清单上看到个什么玩偶熊，是不是你们的拍品？
t_en: You're sellers, right? I just caught sight of a teddy bear on the bid list. Is that yours?

t_ch: 哼，看你们两个一脸正直的样子…这玩偶熊里肯定有诈！
t_en: Hmph, you two with your poker faces... You've got a trick up your sleeves with that bear?

t_ch: …这个大叔，好像觉得全世界的人都在故意骗他…怎么办，荣誉队员？
t_en: ...This guy thinks that the whole world is against him... What should we do, honorary member?

t_ch: 那玩意就是垃圾，千万别竞价。
t_en: The bear is garbage. Don't bid on it.

t_ch: …怎么，还想忽悠我？你不让我竞，那我偏要竞！我才不会吃这哑巴亏！
t_en: ...Trying to dupe me into not bidding on it, huh? Fine, then I will bid for it! I won't let this opportunity slip!

t_ch: 别理他了…
t_en: Just ignore him...

t_ch: 怎么？不想让我占到便宜是吧？那我倒要看看你们这玩偶里面藏着什么玄机，哈！
t_en: Don't want me to profit from your item, huh? Well in that case, I'm definitely gonna solve the mystery of your teddy bear, haha!

t_ch: 让他买你的玩偶大熊吧。
t_en: Let him buy Junjun.

t_ch: 可我不想把「菌菌」卖给怪大叔……
t_en: But I don't wanna sell Junjun to such a weirdo...

t_ch: …怎么，不想让我占到便宜是吧？那我偏要出来竞个价，看看你们这玩偶里藏着什么玄机，哼！
t_en: ...Don't want me to profit from your item, huh? Well in that case, I'll just have to place a bid and solve the mystery of your teddy bear, hahaha!

t_ch: 真是个怪大叔…算啦，起码结果还不错，能多一个人竞价也是好事！
t_en: What a weirdo... Anyway, at least we've tricked him into bidding for it!

t_ch: 那个熊玩偶不简单啊…你看到了吗？
t_en: Well, look at that. That's no ordinary teddy bear...

t_ch: 何以见得？
t_en: You sure about that?

t_ch: 呃…不好意思，我看入神了。没想到真的还有人来搭话。
t_en: Oh! Uh... sorry, I was in a bit of a trance. I didn't know someone was about to strike up a conversation.

t_ch: 罢了，看你也不像有钱竞价的样子，就告诉你吧——那熊玩偶的眼睛可是货真价实的黑宝石！
t_en: Huh, you don't look like you'll be bidding on much, so I'll tell you... That teddy bear's eyes are genuine erebus!

t_ch: 因为它的眼睛是黑宝石？
t_en: Because its eyes are erebus?

t_ch: 等等，你怎么知道？！莫非是…同行？
t_en: ...Wait, how did you know that!? Unless you're... a fellow gemologist?

t_ch: 咳，没错…没想到还有其他人发现了啊。哎，看来想把宝石搞到手没那么容易……
t_en: Ahem, yes... I didn't think anyone else had noticed. *sigh* I guess getting my hands on those gems won't be so simple after all...

t_ch: 但是这实在离谱，我无法理解…为什么要把那么贵重的宝石缝在玩具熊上？这是什么新型诈骗陷阱吗？
t_en: But it's so absurd... I don't understand why precious gems would be sewn onto a teddy bear. Is this some new kind of scam?

t_ch: …你是觉得「菌菌」配不上那块石头嘛？
t_en: ...So you don't think Junjun deserves those gems?

t_ch: 「军军」？那是什么…
t_en: Hehe, Junjun? Who's that?

t_ch: 没什么！这孩子喜欢说胡话…
t_en: No one! This kid's always spouting nonsense...

t_ch: 没事，我也没往心里去。
t_en: It's okay, I didn't take it to heart.

t_ch: 其实我们是那个玩偶的卖家。
t_en: We are, in fact, the bear's sellers.

t_ch: 原来如此，怎么不早说呢？我对你们的拍品很感兴趣。
t_en: Oh, haha, wh—why didn't you bring that up earlier? Your item has piqued my curiosity.

t_ch: 不管怎么说，这种纯度的黑宝石在下层可不多见。得想办法把那只玩具熊搞到手，就算要花大价钱……
t_en: In any case, erebus of that purity is hard to come by in the Underworld. I have to get my hands on that bear, even if it means breaking the bank! Ha...

t_ch: 哼，「菌菌」肯定值大价钱没错！
t_en: Hmph, Junjun will break your bank for sure.

t_ch: （宝石专家也要加入竞标，说不定虎克的玩偶会变得非常抢手呢。）
t_en: (The gemologist will be bidding too. Hook's teddy bear may be the center of attention.)

t_ch: 请问你对玩偶大熊感兴趣吗？
t_en: Are you interested in the teddy bear?

t_ch: 玩偶大熊，可可爱爱！
t_en: He sure is cute and cuddly!

t_ch: …那个……
不感兴趣？打扰了…
t_en: Not interested? Sorry for bothering you...

t_ch: 你看它的造型，多可爱！告诉你，它的触感也特别柔软，让人忍不住想紧紧抱住哦！
t_en: His design is super cute and he's really really soft! You can't help but give him a biiiig hug!

t_ch: 只要把「菌菌」放在身边，每天都会做很温暖的梦哦！心动了没？
t_en: You'll have sweet dreams every night as long as Junjun's by your side! Intrigued...?

t_ch: 虎克听老巫婆说过，有些人确实不擅长当着别人的面说话。干脆用写的吧！
t_en: According to the old witch, some people aren't good at talking in front of other people. Why not ask him to write his thoughts down?
Mm? *sigh*
...Here.

t_ch: …「不感兴趣」？
t_en: ..."Not interested"?

t_ch: 嗯…
t_en: Right...

t_ch: 抱歉，我们这就离开。
t_en: Apologies. We'll leave now.

t_ch: 算了吧，这人明显不感兴趣。
t_en: No need, he doesn't look interested.

t_ch: （现在已经可以去找拍卖师等待竞价开始了…）
t_en: (We could find the auctioneer now and wait for the bidding to begin...)

t_ch: （不过，还有一点点时间，<color=#dbc291ff>也可以再找找看有没有隐藏的买家……</color>）
t_en: (...Although there is still some time left. <color=#dbc291ff>We could also see if we missed any buyers...</color>)

t_ch: 请稍等一会儿，拍卖会很快就要开始了。
t_en: Please wait a moment. The auction will begin shortly.

t_ch: 我想再去发掘一下潜藏的买家…
t_en: I wanna see if there are any more potential buyers...

t_ch: 等待拍卖会开始。
t_en: Let's wait for the auction to begin.

t_ch: 请稍等一会儿，拍卖会很快就要开始了。
t_en: Please wait a moment. The auction will begin shortly.

t_ch: 等待拍卖会开始。
t_en: Let's wait for the auction to begin.

t_ch: （注视着他，等他说出口。）
t_en: (Keep staring at him and wait for him to speak.)

t_ch: （将纸和笔交给他。）
t_en: (Give him a pen and paper.)

t_ch: 这不是外来者吗？果然你也来拍卖会了啊。之前我们见过一面，还记得吗？
t_en: Outsider? I knew you'd show up. We met before, remember?

t_ch: 你是给我传单的那个人…
t_en: You gave me the pamphlet...

t_ch: 没错没错，看来你还记得我。
t_en: That's right, so you do remember me!

t_ch: 你谁啊？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: …这就把我给忘了？好伤心啊…算了，不重要，我们还是聊正事吧。
t_en: ...You don't remember me? How saddening... Anyway, it doesn't matter. Let's get down to business.

t_ch: 实话实说，你肯定是奔着「地髓矿脉探针」来的吧？
t_en: You've obviously come here for the Geomarrow Probe, right?

t_ch: 你怎么知道？
t_en: How did you know?

t_ch: 嘿，很多人都跟你的目的一样。
t_en: Hey, there are lots of people here who want the same thing as you.

t_ch: 你记得「矿灯」巴列维吧？那家伙仔仔细细地跟我确认了一遍。
t_en: Do you remember Balaway the Miner's Lamp? He told me everything.

t_ch: 没这回事，绝对没有…
t_en: No, of course not...

t_ch: 哎呀，你紧张什么？我又不是来探口风的。算了，我就当没这么回事吧……
t_en: Hey, why so tense? I'm not here to elicit information from you. Forget it, pretend I didn't say anything...

t_ch: 对了，我在找歌德大饭店的掌柜歌蒂——你要是在哪见到她了，记得跟我说一声。
t_en: By the way, I'm looking for Gertie, manager of the Goethe Grand Hotel. Please tell me if you see her.

t_ch: 歌蒂的侄女过几天就要回磐岩镇了。前段时间她还在问我，拍卖会上有没有适合送给小孩子的礼物。
t_en: Gertie's niece will be returning to Boulder Town in a few days. She asked me a while ago if there were any gifts suitable for children at the auction.

t_ch: 这不，我看今天的拍品里多了几样适合小朋友的玩意，但是却没见到歌蒂的人影…她不会是回磐岩镇了吧？要是错过拍卖就太可惜了……
t_en: I've noticed there are a few more children's items at the auction today, but I haven't seen Gertie anywhere... She hasn't returned to Boulder Town yet, has she? It would be a shame if she couldn't make it to the auction...

t_ch: 歌蒂的侄女过几天就要回磐岩镇了。前段时间她还在问我，拍卖会上有没有适合送给小孩子的礼物。
t_en: Gertie's niece will be returning to Boulder Town in a few days. She asked me a while ago if there were any gifts suitable for children at the auction.

t_ch: 这不，我看今天的拍品里多了几样适合小朋友的玩意，但是却没见到歌蒂的人影…她不会是回磐岩镇了吧？要是错过拍卖就太可惜了……
t_en: I've noticed there are a few more children's items at the auction today, but I haven't seen Gertie anywhere... She hasn't returned to Boulder Town yet, has she? It would be a shame if she couldn't make it to the auction...

t_ch: （歌蒂在找适合小孩子的玩具？或许可以说服她也来竞价虎克的玩偶熊。）
t_en: (So Gertie's hunting for children's toys? Maybe we can persuade her to bid on Hook's teddy bear too.)

t_ch: 关于拍卖会的事…
t_en: About the auction...

t_ch: 啊，拍卖会怎么了？
t_en: Oh, what about the auction?

t_ch: 我原本想去找找有没有侄女可能喜欢的礼物，玩具、玩偶之类的——贵一点儿也没关系，重要的是能让孩子高兴。
t_en: I wanted to go and see whether there were any gifts, toys, or dolls that my niece might like. I didn't mind if they were a little more expensive than usual, I just wanted her to be happy.

t_ch: 我起早去看了一圈，发现那边的玩意净是些古代遗物、地髓探针之类的，未免过于硬核…转了一圈没有相中的东西，我就提前回来看店了。
t_en: So, I got up early this morning and went to take a look around — turns out all the items were ancient relics. There was something called a Geomarrow Probe. It all sounded a little extreme... I went around the whole venue and couldn't find what I was looking for, so I came back early.

t_ch: 他们新增了适合小孩子的拍品。
t_en: They've added some new kid-friendly items.

t_ch: 没错，里面就有虎克的大熊玩偶哦！歌蒂阿姨的侄女一定会喜欢的！
t_en: That's right, my teddy bear is one of them! Your niece will love him!

t_ch: 现在的小孩就喜欢硬核的…
t_en: Kids today like things that are a little more "extreme"...

t_ch: 哦？对，没错！我在拍卖会上看到了好多想要的东西哦！
t_en: Huh? Y—Yeah, that's right! Hook spotted loads of cool stuff at the auction!

t_ch: 比如，有一只叫「菌菌」的大熊玩偶就很不错！歌蒂阿姨的侄女一定会喜欢的！
t_en: For example, there's this teddy bear called Junjun! Your niece will love him!

t_ch: 这样啊，看来我错过他们补货了…我知道了，我收拾收拾就去流浪者营地看看。谢谢你们特地跑一趟来通知我！
t_en: Oh really? I guess I must've missed the latest additions... In that case, I'll finish up here and head back to the vagrant camp. Thanks so much for letting me know!

t_ch: 大熊玩偶？我看到过，就是缝着黑宝石的那个对吧？我本来是想买的……
t_en: The teddy bear? I've seen it. The one with the erebus eyes, right? I was planning on bidding for it...

t_ch: 「本来想买」？
t_en: But not anymore?

t_ch: …是这么回事，但我兴冲冲地从隔壁镇跑来以后，才发现自己居然忘带钱包了！
t_en: ...Correct. I rushed over here from a neighboring town and forgot my darn wallet!

t_ch: …那还是算了吧！
t_en: ...Well, that really can't be helped!

t_ch: 但是我也有拍卖商品，还有一份商品委托合同。只要我的商品能卖出个好价钱，说不定就够把熊玩偶买下了。
t_en: But I also have my own items to auction and a commodity contract. If I can sell my stuff at a good price, I might be able to afford the bear.

t_ch: 所以呢，所以呢？
t_en: So? What's the catch?

t_ch: 所以…商品合同也被我弄丢了！
t_en: The catch is I... lost the contract!

t_ch: …那还是算了吧！
t_en: ...Well, that really can't be helped!

t_ch: 别着急啊！但是，但是——我知道那份合同被搞到哪里去了！
t_en: Not so fast! I... I know where the contract is.

t_ch: 你说话好像有那个大病…
t_en: This is a heck of a way to tell a story...

t_ch: …然后呢？
t_en: ...And?

t_ch: 我的合同是被一台机器人给偷走的。那家伙躲到机械墓场那边去了，我有点害怕，不敢追上去。
t_en: A robot stole my contract. Now it's lurking somewhere in the machine graveyard, and I'm too terrified to go after it.

t_ch: 唉，真是诸事不顺…拿不回合同的话，大熊玩偶也要离我远去了……
t_en: *sigh* Just my luck... If I can't retrieve the contract, I won't be able to buy that bear...

t_ch: 我的合同是被一台机器人给偷走的。那家伙躲到机械墓场那边去了，我有点害怕，不敢追上去。
t_en: A robot stole my contract. Now it's lurking somewhere in the machine graveyard, and I'm too terrified to go after it.

t_ch: 唉，真是诸事不顺…拿不回合同的话，大熊玩偶也要离我远去了……
t_en: *sigh* Just my luck... If I can't retrieve the contract, I won't be able to buy that bear...

t_ch: 这张纸，就是那个马虎的家伙掉的「胡同」吧？我们把它还回去吧！
t_en: Is this the "contact" that careless guy lost? Let's give it back to him!

t_ch: 唉，真是诸事不顺啊……
t_en: *sigh* When am I gonna catch a break...?

t_ch: 这是你的商品委托合同。
t_en: Here's your commodity contract.

t_ch: 啊？它不是被机器人偷走了吗？怎么会在你手上……
t_en: Huh? But that robot stole it! How did you...?

t_ch: 是我们打倒了那台坏机器人，帮你把「胡同」抢回来了！
t_en: We defeated the evil robot and got your "contact" back!

t_ch: 真的吗？太、太感谢你们了——这下只要我的商品能卖出去，我就有钱去竞拍下黑宝石玩偶熊了！
t_en: Really? Thank you so much! ...Now, if I can just sell my items, I'll... have enough money to bid on the erebus teddy!

t_ch: 你们可真是好心，我不会忘了这份恩情的！
t_en: You two have done me a huge favor, I won't forget it!

t_ch: 谁看见我家的宝贝孙子了？
t_en: Has anyone seen my grandson?

t_ch: 嘿！可算找着你了，别跑啊！这孩子怎么不听话呢…我都说了多少遍了，叫你跟紧我，别走丢了。
t_en: Oh! Finally. Don't run off again! You're such a disobedient... How many times have I told you to stay close to me? You'll get lost!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，快救救我！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, help!

t_ch: 老太太，您认错人了。
t_en: Excuse me ma'am, you've got the wrong kid.

t_ch: 这是我亲孙子，我还能认错？让奶奶仔细看看你的脸…
t_en: This is my flesh and blood! How could I possibly... Come on, let grandma see that cute little face...

t_ch: 哎呀，好像真不是我孙子！
t_en: Oh for the love of... You're not my grandson after all!

t_ch: 虎克，这是你奶奶吗？
t_en: Hook, is this your grandma?

t_ch: 才、才不是！是老奶奶认错人了。
t_en: No! She mistook me for someone else.

t_ch: 胡说，亲孙子我还能认错？让奶奶仔细看看你的脸…
t_en: Nonsense, how could I mistake my own flesh and blood? Come on, let grandma see that cute little face...

t_ch: 哎呀，好像真不是我孙子！
t_en: Oh for the love of... You're not my grandson after all!

t_ch: 我才是你的{F#孙女}{M#孙子}啊！
t_en: I'M your grandchild!

t_ch: …我眼睛虽然有点花，但脑子还没糊涂……
t_en: ...My eyes might not be up to much, but I can assure you my brain's working just fine...

t_ch: 我孙子就在这呢，来，让奶奶仔细看看…
t_en: My grandson is right here. Come on, let grandma me see that cute little face...

t_ch: 哎呀，我好像真的认错了！
t_en: Oh for the love of... You're not my grandson after all!

t_ch: …我的宝贝孙子，到底跑哪儿去了呀？哎哟哟，可真是要了我的老命了……
t_en: ...Then where has my darling grandson gotten to? Oh, dear me, this is dreadful... dreadful!

t_ch: 哟，这位小兄弟，怎么一个人在这地方晃悠呢？
t_en: So, why you hanging around here by yourself, tiny?

t_ch: 对啊对啊，小兄弟——你爸妈哪去了？该不会是自己一个人出门的吧？
t_en: Yeah, tiny. Where are your parents? You didn't go out on your own, did you?

t_ch: …不是你们把我带过来的吗？我奶奶就在那边……
t_en: ...B—But you brought me over here. My grandma's just over there...

t_ch: 住嘴！问你这么多了吗？
t_en: Hey! Did we give you permission to speak?

t_ch: 算了，咱们还装什么好人，看来根本没这个必要…现在就把钱拿出来！
t_en: Alright, enough mister nice guy... Give us the money, now!

t_ch: 住手！
t_en: Stop!

t_ch: 竟敢在虎克大人面前做坏事，你们可真是大胆！看我不用洞洞机收拾你们！
t_en: You dare steal from a kid in front of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!? Let's see how brave you are against Diggertron!

t_ch: 哟，还真有人来见义勇为了。大哥，我看{F#她们}{M#他们}像是有钱人，抢{F#她们}{M#他们}吧！
t_en: Huh, looks like someone's trying to be a hero. Boss, they look rich. We should rob them, too!

t_ch: 好，就抢{F#她们}{M#他们}！上啊！
t_en: Agreed. Get them!

t_ch: 打劫？见者有份啊！
t_en: Robbing a child. New low?

t_ch: 啊？你是什么人？大哥，我看这俩家伙身上的油水肯定比这小屁孩多，要不改抢{F#她们}{M#他们}吧！
t_en: Huh? Who the heck are you? Boss, these two must have more money than this brat. Let's rob them instead!

t_ch: 好，就抢{F#她们}{M#他们}！上啊！
t_en: Agreed. Get them!

t_ch: （多一事不如少一事）
t_en: (We should avoid unnecessary conflict.)

t_ch: 竟然敢在虎克大人面前做坏事，你们可真是大胆。看我不用洞洞机收拾你们！
t_en: You dare steal from a kid in front of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!? Let's see how brave you are against Diggertron!

t_ch: 哟，新来的小屁孩，看来我也得帮你长长记性！大哥，我看{F#她们}{M#他们}像是有钱人，抢{F#她们}{M#他们}吧！
t_en: Huh, looks like two new brats showed up. We'll just have to teach you a lesson as well! Boss, they look rich. Let's rob them too!

t_ch: 好，就抢{F#她们}{M#他们}！上啊！
t_en: Agreed. Get them!

t_ch: 你已经得救啦！快去找你的家人吧！
t_en: You're safe! Go find your family!

t_ch: …好强的小妹妹！要是有朝一日我能和你一样厉害就好了。
t_en: ...Th—That was really brave of you! I hope I can be half as strong as you someday.

t_ch: 谢谢你们，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再见，小妹妹再见！
t_en: Thanks so much guys! I gotta go!

t_ch: 这不是刚才那个小孩儿吗？
t_en: Isn't this the kid we just saved?

t_ch: 啊，是那个帅气的妹妹！
t_en: Ah! It's that brave girl!

t_ch: 奶奶，奶奶，就是那个小妹妹和{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}救了我。
t_en: Grandma, grandma! They're the ones who saved me.

t_ch: 哎哟，我可得好好感谢你们啊！
t_en: Oh my goodness! I can't even begin to express my gratitude!

t_ch: 都是我们应该做的。
t_en: We had to intervene.

t_ch: 真是太感谢你了，我就这么一个乖孙子，心疼都来不及。
t_en: Thank you both so much. He's my only grandson — and I don't know what I would've done.

t_ch: 奶奶，拍卖会上有一个大熊玩偶，我们能买下来吗？
t_en: Can we buy the teddy bear at the auction, grandma?

t_ch: 我们正好需要钱…
t_en: Not even monetarily?

t_ch: 喂，你在干什么呢！虎克要生气啦！
t_en: Hey! What are you doing!? You're making Hook angry!

t_ch: 奶奶，拍卖会上有一个大熊玩偶，我们能买下来吗？
t_en: Can we buy the teddy bear at the auction, grandma?

t_ch: 这大熊玩偶是好心人在卖的吧…行啊，我们去看看呗。
t_en: Oh! I'm sure that teddy bear must've belonged to a nice person... Let's go and take a look.

t_ch: 要是奶奶拍到了，别告诉你爸妈这是奶奶买的，就说是这位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}送给你的吧。
t_en: If grandma wins the auction, don't tell your parents I bought it! Let's pretend it was a gift from this kind {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

t_ch: 太好了，奶奶最棒了！
t_en: Grandma's the best!

t_ch: 那个哥哥和他奶奶的关系好像很好哦！如果是他们把「菌菌」抱回家的话，「菌菌」肯定也会开心的吧……
t_en: Aww, they're really sweet! Junjun will be super happy if they take him home...

t_ch: 哎呀，不想那么多啦！我们走吧，荣誉队员！
t_en: *sigh* Anyway, we should get going. Come on, honorary member!

t_ch: 听说有拍卖会我就来了，但是这儿根本就没有我想要的东西。
t_en: *sigh* I came because I heard there was an auction, but there's nothing I want here.

t_ch: 为什么拍卖行要把起拍价定得这么低啊？要是没人买，我不就亏了吗？
t_en: Why did the auction house set such a low opening bid? I'm bound to make a loss...

t_ch: 干脆我自己去宣传一下吧…跟陌生人搭话真是有点不习惯呀……
t_en: Perhaps I should publicize it myself! Oh... I don't like talking to strangers though...

t_ch: 什么破拍卖会，浪费时间。
t_en: Lousy auction. What a waste of time.

t_ch: 这拍卖会上的东西我都有了，真没意思。
t_en: I already have all of the stuff up for auction. How lame.

t_ch: 我听人说这个拍卖会上有件叫「地髓矿脉探针」的宝贝，但是没想到价格会定这么高啊?
t_en: ...I heard there was something called a Geomarrow Probe at this auction, but I didn't think it would be so pricey.

t_ch: 你听谁说的？这地髓探针是个什么玩意儿？
t_en: Where did you hear that? What is a Geomarrow Probe exactly?

t_ch: 我也不清楚，都是听巴列维老板说的。他要这玩意干什么用我也不清楚。
t_en: I'm not sure, but it was Balaway that told me. I'm not sure why he wants it.

t_ch: 这么贵，估计想要的人也不少，这价格一下就上去了啊。
t_en: So expensive... There must be a lot of people after it for the price to skyrocket like that.

t_ch: 干嘛非得纠结那什么探针啊，我看拍品里有件大熊玩偶，卖相挺不错的……
t_en: Oh, who cares about that probe thing. There's a teddy bear at the auction that looks pretty valuable...

t_ch: 你怎么净喜欢那种小孩子的玩意？嗐，算了，跟你说不到一块儿去。
t_en: What's so appealing about a toy? *sigh* We're clearly operating on different wavelengths.

t_ch: 下一件竞拍品是一件镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，由磐岩镇的宝石藏品爱好者虎克提供。
t_en: The next item has been provided by Hook, a gemstone collector from Boulder Town. It's a handmade teddy bear adorned with erebus.

t_ch: 这件拍品将极为珍贵的黑宝石与…呃，朴素可爱的玩偶结合在一起，设计十分巧妙！起拍价为三百冬城盾。
t_en: An innovative design! It combines incredibly valuable erebus gemstones with, uh... a good old-fashioned cuddly teddy bear! The opening bid is <unbreak>300</unbreak> shield.

t_ch: 三百二十五！
t_en: <unbreak>325</unbreak>!

t_ch: 呃，你这加价二十五是不是有点……
t_en: Oh, you're adding <unbreak>25</unbreak>? Isn't that...

t_ch: 二十五怎么了？我就加二十五！
t_en: What's the problem with <unbreak>325</unbreak>? That's my offer!

t_ch: 三百五十！
t_en: <unbreak>350</unbreak>!

t_ch: 我再加五十！
t_en: I'll add another <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

t_ch: 我…我要加价，加五十！
t_en: A—And I'll add <unbreak>50</unbreak> to that!

t_ch: 我我我，加五十！
t_en: Over here! Add another <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

t_ch: 赌上我宝石鉴定家的名声，一定得把这颗黑宝石拍下来…再加一百冬城盾！
t_en: I'm putting my reputation as a gemologist on the line — I have to get my hands on that erebus... Add another <unbreak>100</unbreak> shield!

t_ch: 四百五十冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>450</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

t_ch: 四百五十冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，四百五十冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>450</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

t_ch: 四百五十冬城盾三次，成交！
t_en: <unbreak>450</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

t_ch: 五百冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>500</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

t_ch: 五百冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，五百冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>500</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

t_ch: 五百冬城盾三次，成交！
t_en: <unbreak>500</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

t_ch: 五百五十冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>550</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

t_ch: 五百五十冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，五百五十冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>550</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

t_ch: 五百五十冬城盾三次，成交！
t_en: <unbreak>550</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

t_ch: 六百冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>600</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

t_ch: 六百冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，六百冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
t_en: <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

t_ch: 六百冬城盾三次，成交！
t_en: <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

t_ch: 这下宝石归我了。
t_en: Phew! The gems belong to me.

t_ch: 啊…希望这些钱就够了，虎克担心会拍不到探针……
t_en: Hmm... I hope this money is enough to buy the probe...

t_ch: 机会很大，别着急。
t_en: Don't worry, we have a solid chance.

t_ch: …嗯，一定可以的！
t_en: ...You're right, let's do this!

t_ch: 买不下来也能准备其他礼物。
t_en: Even if it isn't, you can still get another gift.

t_ch: 话是这么说，但虎克还是想帮老爹拿回重要的宝贝……
t_en: That's true, but I want to help daddy get his treasure back...

t_ch: 呃，现场突发了一些小问题，「地髓矿脉探针」竞拍将会延后。对探针感兴趣的买家，请耐心等待，不要离场……
t_en: The bidding for the Geomarrow Probe has been postponed due to unanticipated complications at the venue. Please be patient and don't leave the auction if you want to bid on it...

t_ch: 各位不用担心，这只是技术性调整！现在我们暂时休息一会儿，拍卖会稍后继续。
t_en: Don't worry, everyone — just a minor technical issue! We'll take a quick break now, and the auction will resume soon.

t_ch: …休息时间？{NICKNAME}，地髓探针会不会出什么问题啦？
t_en: ...A break? {NICKNAME}, do you think there's something wrong with the Geomarrow Probe?

t_ch: 我们去问问吧。
t_en: Let's go ask them.

t_ch: 所有「技术性调整」都是借口…
t_en: "Technical glitches" are always excuses...

t_ch: 那个工作人员就在那边，我们赶紧去问问吧！
t_en: Let's go ask that staff member!

t_ch: 地髓探针到底怎么了？快告诉虎克，现在！立刻！马上！
t_en: What happened to the Geomarrow Probe? Tell me right now! Straight away! Immediately!

t_ch: 这个…不要怕，只是技术性调整，不要怕。
t_en: Uh... There's nothing to worry about — it's just a technical issue.

t_ch: …你说话怎么这么心虚啊！啊，该不会…该不会是探针被偷走了吧！
t_en: ...You don't sound very convincing! *gasp* ...Did someone steal it?

t_ch: …那个，也不能确定是被「偷走」了吧…我们已经联系了卖家，还派出了人手去找，应该很快就能……
t_en: ...Well, we can't say for sure that it was "stolen..." We've contacted the seller and sent some people in search. We should soon be able to...

t_ch: 这地方的小混混太多了。
t_en: This place is full of troublemakers.

t_ch: 就是就是，「地火」怎么一点防范意识都没有！
t_en: Yeah, why wasn't Wildfire keeping a lookout?

t_ch: 还有人敢偷「地火」的东西？
t_en: Who would dare steal from Wildfire?

t_ch: 就是就是，你们「地火」怎么回事，还不如鼹鼠党呢！
t_en: Yeah, why is Wildfire so incompetent? You should have put The Moles in charge!

t_ch: 虎克想抓住小偷，把探针夺回来！荣誉队员，你有什么办法嘛？
t_en: I gotta catch the thief and get the probe back! Any ideas, honorary member?

t_ch: 让我们看看拍卖登记表。
t_en: Let's have a look at the auction registration form.

t_ch: 你的意思是有人在登记注册表上做了手脚吗？不可能，我们全程监督……
t_en: Are you suggesting that someone altered the registration form? That's simply not possible! We've been keeping a close eye on everything...

t_ch: 笨蛋！荣誉队员的意思是，小偷肯定只是来凑热闹的，不买也不卖！对吧，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Fool! What the honorary member means is that the thief only came here to create trouble — they weren't interested in buying or selling! Right, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 原来你脑子这么好使？
t_en: You're smarter than I thought!

t_ch: 鼹鼠党的老大，关键时刻绝对靠谱！
t_en: When the going gets smart, the boss of The Moles gets smarter!

t_ch: 这家伙的工钱得分我们一半…
t_en: This guy should give us half his salary...

t_ch: 那也得有工钱拿啊！懂不懂什么叫志愿者，哎……
t_en: I don't have a salary to give! I'm a volunteer... *sigh*

t_ch: 稍等一下，让我看看……
t_en: Wait a minute, let me see...

t_ch: …呀，除了你们，还真有个人注册了买家的身份，但是却完全没出过价！
t_en: ...Hmm, aside from you, there was someone else who registered as a buyer but never put in a bid!

t_ch: 和他一起注册的好像还有另一个矿工，我还有点印象——走吧，我们去找他们盘问一下。
t_en: ...And I think there was a miner who registered with him. Come on, let's go and interrogate them.

t_ch: 你好…请问，和你一起注册的那位矿工朋友，他现在去哪了？
t_en: Hi, excuse me... may I ask where the miner who registered with you has gone?

t_ch: …哦，他啊，应该已经回镇上去了吧？
t_en: ...Him? I think he went back into town.

t_ch: …居然已经跑了吗？
t_en: So... he already ran away?

t_ch: 他过来的时候说是想买那个什么「地髓矿脉探针」，但后来不知为什么又改了主意，一个人跑回磐岩镇了。
t_en: He came here saying he wanted to buy the Geomarrow Probe, but then he changed his mind for some reason and ran back to Boulder Town alone.

t_ch: 你知道他习惯在哪里活动吗？
t_en: Where can you usually find him?

t_ch: 我跟他也没那么熟，要不你们直接去镇上找他吧？
t_en: I don't know him all that well. Why don't you just head into town and look for him?

t_ch: 那家伙真的是小偷吗？我现在反而不那么确定了……
t_en: Do you really think he'll turn out to be a thief? I'm not so sure now...

t_ch: 咳，算了，外来者，你们去磐岩镇找他吧。我得确保其他的买家没有擅自离场，万一你们扑了个空，那小偷说不定还混在这儿的人群里……
t_en: Ahem, anyway. Outsiders, you should go and look for him in Boulder Town. I need to make sure the other buyers haven't left. If you don't find anything, the thief might still be among us...

t_ch: 走吧，我们回磐岩镇上去抓小偷！
t_en: Let's head back to Boulder Town and catch the thief!

t_ch: 喂，你！你手上是不是拿着地髓探针？快交出来！
t_en: Hey, you! Did you take the Geomarrow Probe? Hand it over, right now!

t_ch: …什、什么？你们是谁，跟我接头的人呢？
t_en: ...Huh — what? Who are you? Where are the people I'm supposed to meet up with?

t_ch: 荣誉队员，我们别和他废话啦，直接把他打趴下吧！
t_en: Honorary member, we shouldn't waste any time talking to him. Let's just knock him out!

t_ch: 嘁，不过是个小鬼，凑什么热闹？你们知道这探针的价值吗？
t_en: Hahahaha, what could a couple of brats do to me? Do you even know how much the probe is worth?

t_ch: 它可是重要的「宝贝」。
t_en: It's a very important treasure.

t_ch: 闭嘴吧，小偷！
t_en: Shut it, thief!

t_ch: 我劝你们识趣一点，老大他可是费了很大力气才打听到这玩意的，万一……
t_en: You two better think twice. The boss put in a lot of effort to find this item. If you even...

t_ch: 小偷，闭嘴！吃洞洞机一拳！
t_en: Enough talk! How about a Diggertron knuckle sandwich!

t_ch: 别打了，别打了！我认怂，我认怂还不行吗！你们冷静点儿，探针给你们，你们也听我讲两句——
t_en: Okay, enough! I give up, okay!? S—Stay calm! I'll give you the probe, just listen to me...

t_ch: 我听那个拍卖师说，地髓探针的成交价至少也得是六百冬城盾往上…六百冬城盾啊！你们见过那么多现金吗？

t_en: What do you think, Hook? Are you willing to buy the Geomarrow Probe from me?

t_ch: …这、这是卖掉「菌菌」赚到的钱，全部都交给娜塔莎姐姐！
t_en: ...Th—This is all the money we got for Junjun. Here, it's all yours!

t_ch: 嗯…让我数数…好像还不太够呢。
t_en: Let's have a count. Hmm, doesn't seem to be enough...

t_ch: 虎克还可以帮娜塔莎姐姐打扫诊所半个月。
t_en: ...Hook could also help Natasha clean the clinic for... half a month?

t_ch: 是三个月哦。
t_en: Three months.

t_ch: 三、三个月？！老…娜塔莎姐姐，虎克想再商量一下……
t_en: Th—Three months!? Witchy old... Natasha, let's negotiate...

t_ch: 没得商量哦。
t_en: Ah-uh, no bargaining.

t_ch: 话说回来，你的生日聚会准备得怎么样了，虎克？邀请了这位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}吗？
t_en: By the way, Hook, how are your birthday party plans coming along? Have you invited this {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

t_ch: 啊，还没有！{NICKNAME}，你愿意来参加虎克的生日聚会吗？
t_en: Oh! Not yet! {NICKNAME}, do you wanna come to my birthday party?

t_ch: 当然可以。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 太好了。
t_en: Great!

t_ch: 我能说不吗？
t_en: Can I say no?

t_ch: 当然不行啦！鼹鼠党的人全都得听漆黑的虎克大人号令！
t_en: Of course not! All members of The Moles must obey Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's commands!

t_ch: 虎克还要去叫上鼹鼠党的小伙伴。等你准备好了就来找虎克吧，我们一起去生日聚会！
t_en: I'll contact the other members of The Moles too. Come find me when you're ready — we'll go together!

t_ch: 娜塔莎姐姐——
t_en: Natasha!

t_ch: 看你这么兴奋，是遇上什么好事了吗，虎克？
t_en: Hook, you look very happy. Did something good happen?

t_ch: 老爹和虎克的生日会就快开始了，快帮虎克包装一下礼物吧！虎克想给老爹一个惊喜！
t_en: Mine and daddy's birthday party is starting soon! Can you help me wrap up this gift! I wanna surprise daddy!

t_ch: 你这孩子，只有在这种时候才会想起我啊。
t_en: *sigh* You rascal... You only come and find me in situations like this.

t_ch: 求、求求娜塔莎姐姐啦！只要肯帮我，虎克就主动帮你打扫诊所半个月！
t_en: Pleeease Natasha! I'll help you clean the clinic for... half a month if you help me!

t_ch: 那就一言为定了。不过，真没想到你们能拍到了这么贵的东西。看来大熊玩偶应该卖出了个好价钱吧？
t_en: Deal. I can't believe you won such a valuable item. Junjun must have fetched a small fortune, huh?

t_ch: 我们说服了很多人去买玩偶。
t_en: We persuaded lots of people to bid on him.

t_ch: 娜塔莎做的玩偶太受欢迎了。
t_en: Natasha's craftsmanship was very popular.

t_ch: 就算有黑宝石的加成，能把玩偶卖到那个价格，你们背后肯定还是付出了不少努力吧？
t_en: Even with the erebus, you must've put in a lot of effort to get such a good price?

t_ch: 费斯曼大叔收到你们准备的礼物，肯定会很开心的。
t_en: Fersman will be very happy with his gift.

t_ch: 话说回来，你的生日聚会准备得怎么样了，虎克？邀请了这位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}吗？
t_en: By the way, Hook, how are your birthday party plans coming along? Have you invited this {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

t_ch: 啊，还没有！{NICKNAME}，你愿意来参加虎克的生日聚会吗？
t_en: Oh! Not yet! {NICKNAME}, do you wanna come to my birthday party?

t_ch: 当然可以。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 太好了。
t_en: Great!

t_ch: 我能说不吗？
t_en: Can I say no?

t_ch: 当然不行啦！鼹鼠党的人全都得听漆黑的虎克大人号令！
t_en: Of course not! All members of The Moles must obey Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's commands!

t_ch: 虎克还要去叫上鼹鼠党的小伙伴。等你准备好了就来找虎克吧，我们一起去生日聚会！
t_en: I'll contact the other members of The Moles too. Come find me when you're ready — we'll go together!

t_ch: 虎克老大，你说的「大功臣」来啦。
t_en: Boss, the "big hero" you mentioned is here.

t_ch: 尤利安，别多嘴啦！
t_en: Julian, knock it off!

t_ch: 「大功臣」？
t_en: "Big hero"?

t_ch: 哎呀，被你听到啦？不可以太骄傲哦，荣誉队员！
t_en: Argh, you heard that? Don't get too cocky, honorary member!

t_ch: 你们在说什么？
t_en: What are you guys talking about?

t_ch: 没什么！虎克才没有在背后夸奖你哦，荣誉队员！
t_en: Nothing! Hmph, Hook would never compliment an honorary member behind their back.

t_ch: 我们正在说有关生日聚会的事，你也想知道吗？
t_en: We were talking about the birthday party. You wanna hear about it too?

t_ch: 生日聚会上有什么吃的？
t_en: What will there be to eat?

t_ch: 虎克每次过生日都要吃歌蒂大婶做的黑豆蛋糕，分量超足！
t_en: Aunt Gertie always makes a big Black Bean Cake for Hook's birthday!

t_ch: 还有还有，老爹每次都会给我准备一只特别大的烤岩居蟹，想想口水就要下来了。
t_en: Oh! Oh! And daddy always makes a huge Roasted Rock Crab for me. It makes my mouth water just thinking about it!

t_ch: 也别忘了洞洞机！每年这个时候，老爹还会准备一年份的机油，让洞洞机喝到饱。
t_en: And don't forget about Diggertron! Daddy brings a year's worth of machine oil and Diggertron drinks it all up!

t_ch: 太宠你了吧？
t_en: Sounds like they spoil you...

t_ch: 我可是鼹鼠党的老大，要是不把肚子填饱，就没力气惩罚坏蛋啦！
t_en: I'm the boss of The Moles! If I don't get enough to eat, how will I have the energy to punish villains?

t_ch: 都邀请了谁啊？
t_en: Who have you invited?

t_ch: 首先当然是老爹啦！说起来，老爹以前从来不过生日，是直到他领养了虎克以后才开始有这个传统的。
t_en: Well, I had to invite daddy first! Speaking of birthdays, daddy never used to celebrate them. He only started doing it when he adopted Hook.

t_ch: 其他客人还有鼹鼠党的小伙伴，还有…对了，还邀请了希儿！她说今天没空，但是会把礼物寄给虎克。
t_en: I also invited other members of The Moles, and... Oh yeah! Seele too! She couldn't come today, but she said she'd still send me a gift.

t_ch: 虎克还邀请了老巫婆，斯薇塔姐姐…当然还有你啦，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！
t_en: I also invited the old witch, Swetta, aaaand... you, of course! The honorary member {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 我们出发吧。
t_en: Let's get going.

t_ch: 老爹我要先来讲两句，大家可别嫌啰嗦——
t_en: I do hope you'll forgive the ramblings of an old man, but I would like to say a few words...

t_ch: 在领养虎克之前，我从来不知道自己的生日，当然也不办什么生日聚会。
t_en: I had no idea when my birthday was before I adopted Hook, and I most certainly did not celebrate it.

t_ch: 直到碰上我女儿之后，我才意识到过生日这件事的意义…所以我才把自己的生日定在和虎克同一天，这样我们就能一起庆祝这个特别的日子了。
t_en: I didn't realize how important birthday celebrations were until I met my daughter... That is why I chose to have my birthday on the same day as Hook, so that we could celebrate this special day together.

t_ch: 就这样年复一年…到了后来，连我自己也开始对生日聚会期待了起来。
t_en: That continued year after year... until I, too, began to look forward to the party.

t_ch: 今天是特别的一天——除了鼹鼠党的小朋友们以外，虎克还请到了这位亲切勇敢的新朋友，{NICKNAME}。希望你也能在聚会上玩得尽兴！
t_en: Today is an extra special day. In addition to The Moles, Hook has invited a dear and brave new friend. {NICKNAME}, I hope you have a wonderful time at the party today!

t_ch: 感谢你们父女的邀请。
t_en: Thank you for inviting me.

t_ch: 毕竟我也算是有功之人嘛。
t_en: I guess I did help out a little.

t_ch: 没错没错，荣誉队员可是帮了大忙了！
t_en: That's right, this honorary member helped Hook a lot!

t_ch: 我听娜塔莎说了，是你护送着虎克去把她的大熊玩偶给拿了回来。哎，以前虎克不抱着那个玩偶就睡不着觉呢。
t_en: Natasha told me that you helped Hook retrieve her teddy bear. It used to be that Hook could only fall asleep when she held that bear in her arms.

t_ch: 老、老爹，别说这个啦！虎克已经长大了，不用抱着「菌菌」也能睡着。
t_en: D—Daddy! Don't bring that up! Hook's grown up now — I can sleep without hugging Junjun...

t_ch: 自从我们离开了矿镇，日子就变得越发难过了。为了养家糊口，老爹总是顾不上照看你，经常连着好几天都回不了家一趟。
t_en: Life has gotten increasingly difficult since we left the mining town. All those days away at work have meant that your dad hasn't always been around to look after you.

t_ch: 还好有「菌菌」一直陪在虎克身边。老爹不在的时候，是「菌菌」让你不至于感到孤单。所以，老爹我……
t_en: But fortunately, Junjun was always with you to keep you company when I wasn't around. I...

t_ch: …老爹！我、我想告诉你……
t_en: ...Daddy! I—I have to tell you something...

t_ch: 其实…其实我已经把「菌菌」卖掉了！
t_en: I... I sold Junjun!

t_ch: 什么？卖…卖掉了？
t_en: Huh? Y—You sold him?

t_ch: 别担心，老爹！虎克已经不需要玩偶陪伴啦！有娜塔莎姐姐、鼹鼠党还有荣誉队员陪着虎克，虎克早就不会觉得孤单了。
t_en: Don't worry, daddy! I don't need a doll to keep me company anymore! Natasha, The Moles and the honorary member will keep me company from now on, so I won't be lonely.

t_ch: 居然…卖掉了……
t_en: You... sold him...

t_ch: 我、我果然是个不称职的老爹，居然连这么重要的事都不知道……
t_en: I truly am an incompetent father. I had no idea...

t_ch: 不不，虎克知道，老爹是最关心虎克的啦！是虎克不想让老爹担心，所以才没告诉你。
t_en: Not true! I know you care about me the most, daddy! I just didn't tell you because I didn't want you to worry.

t_ch: 谢谢你，虎克…但是这样一来，我准备的生日礼物不就……
t_en: Thank you, Hook... but the birthday gift I've chosen is...

t_ch: 哎？老爹你给我准备了什么呀？
t_en: Huh? What did you get for me, daddy?

t_ch: 打开了费斯曼送给虎克的生日礼物盒……
t_en: Hook opens the present that Fersman got her...

t_ch: 这、这是…给玩偶的帽子、衣服、梳妆台！还有一座给玩偶住的小屋子……
t_en: Th—This... a teddy bear's cap, clothes, and a dresser! And a little home for him...

t_ch: 这年头，做玩具的商家真是越来越少了…我走了好几个小镇才买到这些。但是真没想到，「菌菌」已经被卖掉了。可惜……
t_en: Toy-making companies are increasingly scarce this year... I had to travel to different towns. I never expected Junjun might have been sold. What a shame...

t_ch: 没关系，老爹别哭！虎克会跟着娜塔莎姐姐学着再做一个玩偶！
t_en: It's okay daddy, don't cry! Natasha will teach me how to make another doll!
